query: SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, se.id AS a1EventId, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate, COUNT(psd.id) AS kpiScoreRows, ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 6) AS kpiPoints FROM products p LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationCode = 'A1' AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271') GROUP BY p.id, p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, se.id, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate ORDER BY p.batchNo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, se.id AS a1EventId, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate, COUNT(psd.id) AS kpiScoreRows, ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 6) AS kpiPoints FROM products p LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationCode = 'A1' AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271') GROUP BY p.id, p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, se.id, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate ORDER BY p.batchNo;
